final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: abstract-expressionist-fine-art
Asset type: gallery-ready painting, modern art exhibition
Primary request: abstract expressionist artwork with bold color collisions and fluid brushstrokes, conveying emotion and energy without recognizable forms
Scene/backdrop: gallery wall context, neutral exhibition space
Subject: non-representational composition of dynamic gestural marks, drips, and color fields
Style/medium: abstract expressionism, acrylic on canvas, gestural painting
Composition/framing: large-scale canvas format, all-over composition with no focal point, immersive field
Lighting/mood: dramatic gallery lighting emphasizing texture and pigment depth, energetic and visceral
Color palette: bold clashing primaries, saturated oranges, deep blues, raw umbers, titanium white, carbon black
Materials/textures: thick impasto, visible brushstrokes, dripped and splattered paint, raw canvas texture
Constraints: maintain non-representational abstraction, no figurative elements, gallery-appropriate scale
Avoid: recognizable objects, geometric precision, digital smoothness, stock art aesthetic
